message:
test(fcp-registry): add comprehensive verification test coverage

Add 16 new tests for registry supply-chain verification:
- Invalid signature rejection and malformed signature handling
- Binary hash verification (truncated, extra bytes, zero-length)
- Architecture/platform mismatch detection
- Publisher threshold validation (insufficient signatures)
- Attestation acceptance (single and multiple types)
- Transparency log with evidence verification
- Capability ceiling enforcement
- Verification report completeness

Also add MockRegistry implementation with builder pattern for
deterministic testing of connector bundles.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
